description: Single-cell RNA sequencing data (FACS and microfluidic droplet) from ~350,000 cells across 23 tissues and organs from male and female C57BL/6JN mice at six age groups (1, 3, 18, 21, 24, and 30 months). Includes 110,824 annotated FACS cells and 245,389 annotated droplet cells.
Processed gene count matrices and cell metadata for the Tabula Muris Senis dataset, providing ready-to-analyse count tables for both FACS and droplet data.
Raw data files (FASTQ and related) for the Tabula Muris Senis dataset hosted on a public AWS S3 bucket.
Interactive web-based data browser for exploring the entire Tabula Muris Senis dataset, including gene expression queries across tissues and age groups.
